stat: Blended annual AI tooling budget range for a 10-seat UK team across five commonly cited subscription tiers
method: Recipe D (cost-per-outcome ratio across vendors) — blending several vendors' published per-seat pricing into a single team-level annual budget range that no single vendor publishes
workings: Per-seat monthly list prices: GitHub Copilot Business $19, ChatGPT Business $20 (annual billing), Claude Team Standard $20 (annual billing), Microsoft 365 Copilot £30 (add-on), Claude Team Premium with Claude Code $100 (annual billing). Dollar prices converted at $1 = £0.75 (July 2026): $19 = £14.25, $20 = £15, $100 = £75. Each annualised for a 10-seat team (price x 10 x 12): GitHub Copilot Business £1,710; ChatGPT Business £1,800; Claude Team Standard £1,800; Microsoft 365 Copilot £3,600; Claude Team Premium £9,000. Range across all five tiers: £1,710 (lowest) to £9,000 (highest).
